positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) sitting peacefully atop a crescent moon. The fox has ethereal, flowing lines and sharp, geometric details. The background features swirling nebula patterns and scattered, glowing stars, rendered in deep indigo, cosmic violet, and electric cyan. Composition should be centered and highly contrasted, utilizing negative space effectively. Art style should be a blend of modern flat design and neo-traditional tattoo linework, suitable for apparel print. Highly detailed lines, crisp vector quality, perfect symmetry.
